name: RTTY
author: contributors
description: Receive-only Baudot/ITA2 RTTY decoder. Reads the demodulated RX band audio through the host's read-only audio tap (never alters live audio, occupies no insert slot) and deframes AFSK FSK into text. Two quadrature tone detectors (mark/space) feed a software UART; ITA2 LETTERS/FIGURES with unshift-on-space. Tunable mark tone, shift and baud — amateur defaults are 2125 Hz mark, 170 Hz shift, 45.45 baud. The panel shows decoded text plus a mark/space tuning indicator. Transmit support follows once the host exposes plugin TX keying.
